The Government's Decision-
Secretary (2) to suggest measures for the control of hemophilia.
A State Level Committee under the Chairmanship of Department of Public Health, Mantralaya, Mumbai as follows:
is being established.
Government Decision HATH: Meeting-1526 / Q. No.43 / No.2
Functions of the Committee:
Preparation of preventive treatment guidelines for hemophilia.
2. Prepare guidelines for treatment of hemophilia.
3. Suggest measures for effective implementation of hemophilia programme.
